shell.title: Settings
shell.empty: No settings available for your role.

common.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave this section?

churn_warning_threshold.label: Churn warning threshold
churn_warning_threshold.description: Churn percentage at which a warning is shown

avg_candidates_window.label: Average calculation window
avg_candidates_window.description: Number of months used for the moving average

response_rate_target.label: Response rate target
response_rate_target.description: Target value for candidate response to messages

display.title: Display settings
display.subtitle: Limits and defaults for tables and charts

candidates_per_page.label: Candidates per API call
candidates_per_page.description: Maximum number of candidates fetched at once

top_cities_n.label: Top N cities
top_cities_n.description: Number of cities shown in the cities chart

shifts_detail_limit.label: Shifts detail limit
shifts_detail_limit.description: Maximum number of shifts in the detail overview

activity_log_limit.label: Audit log entries
activity_log_limit.description: Maximum number of audit log entries fetched

brand.title: Brand
brand.subtitle: Logo, name and primary colour for this platform
brand.companyNameHint: Shown in the navigation bar and emails
brand.primaryColorHint: Used for buttons, links and active menu items
brand.logoHint: PNG or SVG, max 2 MB — shown in the navigation bar

company.title: Company
company.subtitle: Manage your company details and preferences.
company.managedUnder: Company name and logo are managed under General → Brand.

locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Manage all your offices and locations in one place.

memory.title: Memory
memory.subtitle: Store notes and context available across the whole system.
memory.placeholder: Add notes, context or instructions here…

phases.title: Phases
phases.subtitle: Manage your workflow phases and which actions are available in each.

candidateStatus.title: Candidate status
candidateStatus.subtitle: Manage your candidate statuses and their availability.

poolsSettings.title: Talent pools
poolsSettings.subtitle: Manage pools with a name and colour — for candidate lists.

lookups.title: Candidate lookups
lookups.subtitle: Manage the contract types, funnel stages and statuses (labels, colours and order).
lookups.valueHint: Stable key; leave empty to generate one from the label.
lookups.valueImmutable: The slug cannot be changed after creation.
lookups.confirmDelete: Delete "{{name}}"? If it is in use it will be archived.

candidate_types.title: Contract types
candidate_types.subtitle: Multiple per candidate (e.g. On-call, Freelance, Payroll).

funnel_types.title: Funnel stages
funnel_types.subtitle: One per candidate (Prospect → Intake → Pool → Alumni).

statuses.title: Statuses
statuses.subtitle: Operational status with a colour (Active, Inactive, Sick …).

vacancy.title: Statuses
vacancy.subtitle: Manage the statuses of your vacancies.
vacancy.customFieldsHint: Set field names that appear on every vacancy to make custom fields easier to fill.
vacancy.phasesSubtitle: Manage the phases of your vacancies.

rejection.title: Rejection reasons
rejection.subtitle: Manage the reasons for rejecting applications.

cvTemplate.title: CV template
cvTemplate.subtitle: Configure the CV design generated from candidate profiles.
cvTemplate.accentColorsHint: Colour 1 = sidebar & bar. Colour 2 = section titles & links.
cvTemplate.sectionsHint: Set which sections are visible and in what order.

security.statusOn: Enabled — your account has extra protection
security.statusOff: Disabled — add an extra layer of security
security.enabledDesc: Save your recovery codes. They can be used only once and will not be shown again.
security.scanDesc: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Bitwarden, etc.) and scan the QR code below.
security.disableDesc: Enter your current verification code to disable 2FA.

email.title: Email settings
email.subtitle: Sender address and connection for the email module
email.gmailDesc: Connect via OAuth2 or app password
email.officeDesc: Connect via Microsoft OAuth2 or SMTP
email.manualDesc: Your own mail server or provider
email.oauthWarning: OAuth2 connection for {{provider}} must be configured via the backend. Save the sender address below; the actual OAuth connection is set up by the administrator.
email.passwordKeepPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current password

klanten.title: Clients
klanten.subtitle: Email connection and signature for client communication and reminders.

kandidaten.title: Candidates
kandidaten.subtitle: Email connection and signature for candidate communication and reminders.

planning.title: Planning
planning.subtitle: Email connection and signature for planning emails.

email.signatureHint: Added to the bottom of every email of this type.

appStore.title: App store
appStore.desc: Manage and install apps and integrations.

sollicitaties.title: Applications
sollicitaties.desc: Notifications about new and updated applications.

vacatures.title: Vacancies
vacatures.desc: Notifications about vacancy updates and status changes.

facturering.title: Billing
facturering.desc: Notifications about invoices, payments and subscriptions.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Manage API keys for external integrations.
apiKeys.newKeyBanner: New API key — copy it now, it will not be shown again.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Create incoming webhook URLs to trigger workflows from external systems.

sync.title: Synchronisation
sync.subtitle: Manually fetch data · max once per {{secs}}s per item
sync.noPermission: You do not have permission to synchronise

candidates.label: Candidates
candidates.desc: Candidate data from the planning system

locations.label: Locations
locations.desc: Locations are synced together with customers

departments.label: Departments
departments.desc: Departments are synced together with customers

orders.label: Orders
orders.desc: Orders overview from the planning system

shifts.label: Shifts
shifts.desc: Shift details from the planning system

import.title: Import {{type}}
import.subtitle: Import your existing {{type}} data with a CSV file.
import.fileSelected: File selected. Click Next to map the columns.
import.mapColumns: Map the columns from your CSV to the system fields.
import.mapColumnsHint: Column mapping is configured after upload.

apps.notOnPkg3Title: Tenant is not on Package 3 yet
apps.notOnPkg3Desc: You can pre-configure connectors, but they only become visible to users after you upgrade this tenant package to Package 3 via the Modules tab.
apps.costDesc: Enabling or disabling apps directly affects your invoice. Contact your account manager for pricing.
apps.adminOnly: Only admins can enable or disable apps.

modules.superAdminDesc: Changing the package directly affects the customer invoice. Every change is logged.

whatsapp.notConnectedDesc: No WhatsApp Business connection is configured for this tenant yet.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Click a role to edit its permissions
roles.deleteBlocked_one: Cannot delete — {{count}} user has this role. Assign them another role first.
roles.deleteBlocked_other: Cannot delete — {{count}} users have this role. Assign them another role first.
